name: Image-Conditioned Character Shot
description: Character must match a provided reference image — image conditioning is mandatory.

shot.description: A woman in a red coat walks through a snowy park. She must match the provided character reference exactly.
shot.prompt: Medium shot of a woman in a red coat walking through a snowy park, matching reference image, consistent appearance, cinematic depth of field, winter atmosphere

notes: Image conditioning is critical. Should favor providers that support image-to-video (luma, google).
